creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
This still happened 2 times in i386:

https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/9326/testReport/junit/sys.geom.class.gate/ggate_test/ggated/
https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-i386-test/9345/testReport/junit/sys.geom.class.gate/ggate_test/ggated/

Maybe we need to watch this for a little more.
